title: Battle of Tibrin
content:
{{Top|ga|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Tibrin revolution]]{{FactFile2014|32|GRE 1-4|Clone Commander Gree}} |conc= |next= |image=[[File:Battle_of_Tibrin.jpg]] |name=Battle of Tibrin |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] |place=[[Tibrin/Legends|Tibrin]] |result=[[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] victory |side1=[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] |side2=*Confederacy of Independent Systems *[[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=*[[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' *[[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Marshal Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|CC-2224]]{{TCW|Rookies (episode)}} *[[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|CC-1004]]{{TCW|Cloak of Darkness|d=y}} *[[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rex/Legends|CT-7567]] |commanders2= |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1=*[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] **At least 1 [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] *[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] **[[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|Clone subtroopers]] |forces2= |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=Many [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Trooper/Legends|troopers]] |casual2= |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Well, that sure complicates things, Commander.''"
"''No worse than that time on Tibrin.''"
"''We had Jedi with us on Tibrin. They ''helped''.|Commander Cody and Captain Rex|}} The '''Battle of Tibrin''' of [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] was a failed [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] attempt to oust the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]' [[Confederacy military/Legends|military]] presence from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tibrin/Legends|Tibrin]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The native [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] populace had previously welcomed the arrival of Separatist [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] and his cadre of [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]], who [[Death/Legends|executed]] [[Suribran Tu]]—the planet's unpopular, pro-Republic [[Premier (Tibrin)|premier]]—and [[Tibrin revolution|overthrew]] his totalitarian [[Suribran Tu's regime|regime]]. Consequently, the Ishi Tib aided the Confederacy when [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] and [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] from the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] came to retake Tibrin. The result was a catastrophic Republic defeat, with Tibrin retaining its Separatist ties. Many of the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] who survived the battle, including [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]] of the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]], adopted a [[Hair/Legends|hairstyle]] called the [[double stripe]] to honor their fallen comrades. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Sora Bulq. Take charge of the local government until a new one is in place. Kill ''everyone'' in Tu's inner circle—generals, politicians, family. Kadrian Sey. You and Tol Skorr clear away the body. Let the populace see that he's dead. Mount his head somewhere ''highly'' visible.|Dooku issues orders to his Dark Acolytes following his murder of Suribran Tu|}} [[File:Tibrin_Seps.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The Ishi Tib laud Dooku's execution of Suribran Tu.]] Since the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|outbreak]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] in the [[Standard year/Legends|year]] [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' the native [[Ishi Tib/Legends|Ishi Tib]] inhabitants of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Tibrin/Legends|Tibrin]] clamored to join the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]].{{CSWECite|III|267|Tu, Suribran}} Yet the planet's dictatorial [[Premier (Tibrin)|premier]],{{FactFile|134|TYR 1-2|Rise of a Tyrant}} [[Suribran Tu]], retained the support of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], even though his [[Suribran Tu's regime|administration]] oppressed the will of the people and was marred by corrupt practices, such as strong-arm tactics and [[Politics/Legends|political]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassinations]]. When Separatist [[Head of State/Legends|leader]] [[Count of Serenno/Legends|Count]] [[Dooku/Legends|Dooku]] came to negotiate for the rights to use Tibrin as a base, he was unimpressed with Tu's willingness to become a Separatist-loyal planetary ruler simply as a means of preserving his own position and power. Seeing no benefit to further deliberations, Dooku [[Sai cha/Legends|beheaded]] Tu with his [[Dooku's lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] and had the ex-dictator's head publicly displayed for the citizenry to see. Dooku also installed one of his [[Dark Acolyte/Legends|Dark Acolytes]], [[Sora Bulq/Legends|Sora Bulq]],''[[Jedi: Count Dooku]]'' as Tibrin's provisional [[Governor/Legends|governor]], with orders to [[Death/Legends|purge]] Tu's inner circle—everyone from military and political [[Officer/Legends|officers]] to his family. The Ishi Tib population, grateful to be free of Tu and the Republic, extolled Dooku as a liberator and eagerly joined the Confederacy, inciting a [[Tibrin revolution|revolution]] on their world. ==The battle== [[File:Gree_CoD.jpg|thumb|right|150px|Commander Gree was one of many Tibrin survivors to wear the double stripe.]] Unwilling to let the Confederacy's influence on Tibrin go unchallenged, the Republic sent [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] and [[Clone SCUBA trooper/Legends|clone subtrooper]] forces from the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. The forces operated under the command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] officers—including [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] and [[High Jedi General/Legends|High General]] [[Kit Fisto/Legends|Kit Fisto]]—to uproot Dooku's [[Confederacy military/Legends|military]] presence on Tibrin. [[Clone Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]] of the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite Corps]], [[Clone Marshal Commander/Legends|Marshal Commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] of the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]], and [[Clone Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Rex/Legends|Rex]] of the [[501st Legion/Legends|501st Legion]] were among the Grand [[Army/Legends|Army's]] [[Troop/Legends|troop]] leadership. However, the Ishi Tib resisted the Republic's attempts to meddle in their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld's]] affairs. The campaign ended in a crushing defeat for the Republic forces, with many [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] perishing in the battle. ==Aftermath== The Battle of Tibrin, as the grisly campaign came to be known, resulted in the Ishi Tib preserving their loyalty to the Confederacy. Though they continued to send a [[Senator/Legends|representative]] to the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Republic Senate]]{{StarshipsVehiclesCite|25|Star Wars A–Z}} in the form of Senator [[Gume Saam/Legends|Gume Saam]], he held clandestine connections to the Separatists and the [[Techno Union/Legends|Techno Union]], becoming involved in a war-profiteering plot to thwart a [[Confederate–Republic peace initiative/Legends|peace initiative]] between the Republic and the [[Separatist Senate/Legends|Separatist Parliament]].{{TCW|Heroes on Both Sides}} To honor the comrades they lost at Tibrin, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Gree and many other clone survivors of the battle adopted a [[Color/Legends|red]]-colored [[Hair/Legends|buzz cut]] that became known as the [[double stripe]]. ==Behind the scenes== The Battle of Tibrin was first mentioned, albeit unidentified, in the [[2005]] novel ''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'', written by [[James Luceno]]. The event was later identified in the [[The Official Star Wars Fact File Part 32|thirty-second issue]] of the [[The Official Star Wars Fact File (2013)|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'']] series, which was published on [[August 13]], [[2014]]{{FactFile2014Dates|32}} and written by [[Iain Lowson]].{{LinkedIn|url=in/iainlowson|text=Iain Lowson|archivefile=File:IainLowson-LinkedIn.png}} ==Appearances== *{{TCW|Rookies (episode)}} {{Imo}} *{{TCW|Cloak of Darkness|d=y}} {{Imo}} *''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1stm}} ==Sources== *{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/guide/episode005.html|text=''The Clone Wars'' Episode Guide: Rookies}} *''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'' *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=series/clone-wars/rookies-episode-guide|text="Rookies" Episode Guide | The Clone Wars}} *{{FactFile2014|32|GRE 1-4|Clone Commander Gree}} {{1stID|Battle of Tibrin}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Tibrin |fi=Tibrinin taistelu |fr=Bataille de Tibrin }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tibrin, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of the Clone Wars]] [[Category:Battles of Tibrin]]
